name: layout/center
description: Horizontally centered container with a configurable max-width.

meta.name: Center
meta.description: Horizontally centered container with a configurable max-width.

whenToUse: Horizontally centering content within a configurable max-width
Constraining page or section content to a readable measure
whenNotToUse: Stacking children with consistent gaps — use Flex
Multi-column or grid arrangements — use Columns or Grid

related.name: Section
related.reason: Sections use a centered inner width built on the same idea

related.name: Flex
related.reason: Stack the centered content vertically inside it with Flex

intent.a11yRationale: Pure layout wrapper with no semantic role; does not affect the accessibility tree.
